recommendations.director: David Maysles, Muffie Meyer, Ellen Giffard, Albert Maysles

recommendations.title: Fauve
recommendations.overview: Set in a surface mine, two boys sink into a seemingly innocent power game with Mother Nature as the sole observer.

recommendations.overview: Agnes and her two sisters struggle through a day in a home overrun by gamblers, thieves, and johns.

recommendations.overview: The inhabitants of a small Japanese town become increasingly obsessed with and tormented by spirals.

recommendations.title: 13 Minutes

recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.
